question: What specific events could re-rate or further de-rate NVO in the next 6 months?

findings.claim: Wegovy HD (semaglutide 7.2mg) FDA-approved March 19, 2026 under accelerated Commissioner's National Priority Voucher (54 days from filing). Launching April 2026.
findings.data: STEP UP trial: 20.7% mean weight loss at 72 weeks in 1,407 adults without diabetes (vs ~18% for 2.4mg, ~2% placebo). One-third of patients lost >=25%. T2D cohort (STEP UP T2D): 14.1% weight loss, 21.3% achieving >=20%. Eligible for patients who tolerated 2.4mg for >=4 weeks. Side effects: nausea/vomiting; dysesthesia in 22% (vs 6% for 2.4mg). Available April 2026 through 70,000+ pharmacies. Already approved in EU/UK.

findings.claim: CATALYST: Wegovy HD (20.7% weight loss) narrows the gap with Zepbound/tirzepatide, potentially recapturing patients who switched to Lilly for superior efficacy.
findings.data: Wegovy 2.4mg: ~18% weight loss. Wegovy HD 7.2mg: 20.7%. Zepbound (tirzepatide 15mg): ~22.5% in SURMOUNT-1. The gap has narrowed from ~4.5pp to ~1.8pp. CagriSema at 23% (REDEFINE-4) was not non-inferior to tirzepatide 25.5%, but Wegovy HD at 20.7% as a single-agent injectable is competitive enough for patients wanting to stay within semaglutide ecosystem.

findings.claim: Q1 2026 earnings on May 6, 2026 (confirmed, before market open). Analyst EPS estimates: $0.86-$0.93.
findings.data: Q4 2025 reported Feb 4, 2026: EPS $1.00 vs $0.89 consensus (beat by 12.36%). Stock fell 6.18% post-earnings despite the beat, due to guidance. Q1 2026 will be the first quarter to capture full impact of oral Wegovy launch and pricing changes. November 4, 2026: next major report (Q1-Q3 2026 results).

findings.claim: Lexicon Pharmaceuticals and Novo Nordisk initiated Phase 1 study of LX9851, an oral non-incretin candidate for obesity (March 23, 2026) — early-stage pipeline diversification.
findings.data: Phase 1 study of LX9851, an oral non-incretin development candidate for obesity and associated metabolic disorders. Early stage (Phase 1), unlikely to be material within 6 months, but signals Novo's pipeline diversification beyond GLP-1.
